notes: Note: without_skill output coincidentally uses Sanctuary tokens — assertions may not be discriminating enough
With-skill outputs consistently use Sanctuary design tokens: font-serif italic, rounded-[2rem]+, decorative glows, motion/react, primary blue palette
Without-skill outputs use generic styling (violet theme, small radii, bold sans-serif headings)
Eval 3 (settings) is not discriminating — without_skill also passes because it coincidentally uses Sanctuary tokens. Consider adding checks for serif italic headings or decorative glow blobs.
With-skill adds ~8s execution time due to reading and following the skill document
The skill is most impactful for eval-1 (pass_rate delta: +0.75) and eval-2 (+0.71)
